bdo.util.net.ssl.compositejks

Class KeyStoreLoader

  • java.lang.Object
    • bdo.util.net.ssl.compositejks.KeyStoreLoader

  • public final class KeyStoreLoader
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility methods for loading KeyStores.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static java.security.KeyStore fromFile(java.io.File keyStoreFile, char[] passphrase)
      Loads a KeyStore from an on-disk file.
      static java.security.KeyStore fromStream(java.io.InputStream stream, char[] passphrase)
      Loads a KeyStore from an InputStream.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • fromStream

        public static java.security.KeyStore fromStream(java.io.InputStream stream,
                                                char[] passphrase)
                                         throws java.io.IOException,
                                                java.security.GeneralSecurityException
        Loads a KeyStore from an InputStream.
        Parameters:
        stream - A byte stream containing the key store.
        passphrase - The passphrase the stream is encrypted with.
        Returns:
        The newly loaded KeyStore.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
        java.security.GeneralSecurityException

      • fromFile

        public static java.security.KeyStore fromFile(java.io.File keyStoreFile,
                                              char[] passphrase)
                                       throws java.io.IOException,
                                              java.security.GeneralSecurityException
        Loads a KeyStore from an on-disk file.
        Parameters:
        keyStoreFile - The file containing the key store.
        passphrase - The passphrase the file is encrypted with.
        Returns:
        The newly loaded KeyStore.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
        java.security.GeneralSecurityException
